_notes: This example does NOT enable the proxy admin listener, so
/healthz is unreachable. The data plane's /health endpoint is
feature_endpoints[] is empty. Every URL in this example is
either a 402 (multi-rail challenge) or a 406 (no acceptable
rail); none of those are 2xx. The Makefile's `make test` target
covers the negotiation matrix for hands-on validation.
audit_check stays false until Wave 2 (R1.2) ships the OSS
